arts.ttl: Man United trio drop early team news hints for Ruben Amorim's first lineup selection at Ipswich
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news as the team are gearing up for their first game under the new head coach when they take on Ipswich on Sunday (4.30pm kick-off)

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Amorim gives green light for major Man Utd transfer, player favours them over Arsenal & others
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim is understood to have given the club the green light to try to seal the return transfer of Angel Gomes from Lille. arts.ttl: Man United 'make approach' for Real Madrid midfielder as Ruben Amorim suffers rejection
arts.sum: Real Madrid midfielder Eduardo Camavinga reportedly turns down an advance from Manchester United for a transfer to Old Trafford either in January or the summer.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has different opinion of Man Utd star labelled 'coward' by former team-mate
arts.sum: This midfielder was labelled a coward by one of his former team-mates, but new Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim thinks quite the opposite

arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU remember the Man United side that secured a record 9-0 win over Ipswich?
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!

arts.ttl: Man Utd expected XI vs Ipswich as Ruben Amorim immediately makes his mark
arts.sum: Manchester United take on Ipswich Town as Ruben Amorim takes charge of his first Premier League match at Portman Road and looks to inspire the Red Devils into better form

arts.ttl: Man United boss Ruben Amorim's first formation at Sporting and what fans can expect
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is just hours away from his Premier League debut as a manager when Manchester United travel to Portman Road face Ipswich Town - here's what fans can expect to see

arts.ttl: How Man Utd bosses have fared in their first game as Ruben Amorim prepares for Ipswich clash
arts.sum: Managers have come and gone at Manchester United but the first game is usually a good indication of how successful their reign will be - and Ruben Amorim will be hopeful he can start with a win against Ipswich

arts.ttl: Man Utd told to consider hijacking Liverpool transfer deal for Arne Slot forward target
arts.sum: Omar Marmoush has been a revelation this season for Eintracht Frankfurt and Sir Alex Ferguson's former assistant Rene Meulensteen believes he could be a big hit at Old Trafford if Manchester United were willing to pounce

arts.ttl: Man United draw up three man shortlist as they prepare for Ruben Amorim’s first signing
arts.sum: Manchester United are ready to enter the transfer market to support new manager Ruben Amorim. The Red Devils are looking to sign a new left-wing back after both their current left-sided defenders Tyrell Malacia and Luke Shaw are out with fitness issues and their long term future under the new manager remains uncertain.
